description: Welding Cable is prepared for industrial B2B sourcing by distributors, importers, repair workshops and OEM buyers. It can be quoted for Welding Accessories supply programs after the buyer confirms required quantity, packaging, destination country and technical references. Material, size, thread, compatible model, OEM number and other product details should be confirmed by drawing, product photo, reference part or model number before final quotation. ArcFort Weld supports standard export packing and OEM packaging discussion when order details are available. Buyers can also send an existing product list or sample photo so the sales team can review the item and prepare a more practical RFQ response.
